# External Template Structure - CV / Resume

## Purpose
Document the structure used by staffing agencies for ATS-safe, recruiter-readable CVs.

## Source Pattern References
- Robert Half resume structure conventions.
- Hays IT resume guidance conventions.

## Canonical Sections
1. Header block (name, location, phone, email, LinkedIn).
2. Professional summary (3-4 lines role-targeted).
3. Core skills matrix (keywords mirrored from listing).
4. Experience history (reverse chronological, measurable bullets).
5. Education and certifications.
6. Tools/platforms and language section.

## Field Rules
- Use exact role keywords from target posting.
- Use action + outcome format in experience bullets.
- Avoid graphics/tables for ATS compatibility.

## Usage Guidance
Use this as a structural blueprint only; do not copy branded text from source agencies.
